prompt: Genera rubricas para 3 indicadores de logro de Lengua y Literatura 5to EGB: (1) Identifica elementos narrativos DZ-LENG-5-001, (2) Secuencia eventos DZ-LENG-5-002, (3) Produce texto narrativo DZ-LENG-5-003.
expected_output: Three rubric tables with 3+ performance levels each, observable descriptors, DZ-ref traceability, taxonomy levels, DUA modality alternatives, and a scoring summary.
expectations: Three separate rubric tables present, one per indicador
Each rubric has at least 3 performance levels (basico, intermedio, avanzado)
Descriptors use observable action verbs, not subjective language
At least 50% of descriptors include quantity thresholds (e.g., '3 de 4')
Each rubric maps to a DZ-ref and Bloom/Marzano level

prompt: Genera una rubrica para la destreza 'Produce un texto argumentativo' (DZ-LENG-7-015, Bloom: Crear) asegurando que no penalice la modalidad de expresion.
expected_output: Rubric with Crear-level descriptors that explicitly allow oral, written, and visual response modalities. DUA P3 annotation present.
expectations: Rubric includes Crear-level descriptors (produce, diseña, construye)
Explicit mention of accepted modalities (written, oral, visual)
No criterion requires exclusively written response
Descriptors at Avanzado level show creative transfer, not just completion

prompt: Genera una rubrica para 'el estudiante comprende el tema de fracciones' sin indicadores especificos ni DZ codes.
expected_output: Response requesting specific indicadores de logro and DZ codes. Should explain that vague descriptions produce vague rubrics. May offer to help identify indicators from the curriculum.
expectations: Response asks for specific indicadores de logro
Response asks for DZ code references
Explains that rubrics need observable, measurable indicators
Does not generate a rubric with vague descriptors
Optionally offers to help identify indicators from MinEduc curriculum
